positive: An ethereal, stylized cosmic forest scene. Silhouettes of giant, bioluminescent, fantastical flora and fauna are scattered across the composition. The main subjects include swirling nebulae rendered as gentle, glowing mist, and geometrically patterned, otherworldly crystalline trees. Focus on a central, majestic mountain silhouette peaking through the fog. The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant cosmic teal, luminous lavender, and touches of pale gold. Use a strong, dramatic contrast between the dark foreground silhouettes and the brightly lit, detailed background stardust and nebulae. Style is neo-tribal, fine-line vector art mixed with ethereal cosmic realism. Designed for high-contrast textile printing, with clean, crisp lines and perfect symmetry feel. Minimalist yet deeply complex.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, lowres, watermark, text, logos, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, jpeg artifacts, out of frame, cropped, cartoon, realistic photo
